topic: A person changing a flat tire on a car.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: The person loosens lug nuts, front view
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: The person lifts the car with a jack, side-angle
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: The person mounts the spare onto the hub, top-down
parsed_generation.narration: The sequence follows a single person changing a flat tire on a car, starting with loosening the lug nuts, then lifting the car, and finally mounting the spare. The shots stay tight on the tire-change process, with cinematic, action-first pacing.

feedback: The sequence covers loosening nuts, lifting the car, and mounting the spare, but misses key steps in the gold standard: removing the flat tire, tightening the lug nuts in a star pattern, and the final lowering with torque. To align with the gold standard, add a shot showing tire removal and spare placement, a shot demonstrating star-pattern nut tightening, and a final shot of lowering the car and completing the torque. Also align timestamps and durations to the canonical [00:00-00:03], [00:03-00:06], [00:06-00:08] format with precise camera angles.
strengths: Clear three-shot structure with distinct camera angles
Maintains focus on a single subject throughout
fixes: Include explicit tire removal and replacement sequence (remove tire, place spare, hand-tighten nuts in a star pattern)
Add final lowering and torque tightening after mounting the spare
Match gold-standard timestamp conventions and durations (e.g., [00:00-00:03], [00:03-00:06], [00:06-00:08]) with precise camera directions
